text:
There was once a small village called Evergreen.

It was well-known for its unique birds. Every year, the villagers hosted what they called the Singing Bird Festival.

This year was special.

The birds were singing like nothing ever heard before. They sang strange tunes.

A young girl went bird-watching.

She found one bird that sang just like her favorite book character.

She followed it through forests.

Finally, she sang like it.

Every bird in Evergreen sang.

That year, they had their best festival ever.

Many townspeople sang.

They sang for hours.

And that's just how Evergreen got its name.

Every little bird liked singing opera.

At night.

Oh, how the owls enjoyed it.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
